notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 20-24 in generated discovery row order.

This packet covers Heroes' Feast and the four Investiture spells. Runtime edits encode all mechanics the current schema can carry; remaining actionable_open entries identify first-class schema gaps instead of leaving them as prose-only surprises.

heroes-feast::terrain_or_surface.issue: The feast surface, unoccupied 10-foot Cube, and adjacent placement are now represented by targeting plus a creation utility option.
heroes-feast::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain field required for this pass.
heroes-feast::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.areaOfEffect and UTILITY creation/controlOptions.

heroes-feast::resource_or_consumption.issue: The 1-hour consumption window, disappearance timing, and delayed benefit onset are now represented as structured utility options.
heroes-feast::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional resource field required for this pass.
heroes-feast::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Delayed Benefits utility option.

heroes-feast::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: The participant's Hit Point maximum increases by 2d10 and the participant gains the same number of Hit Points; runtime now records the healing and prose but lacks a first-class hit-point-maximum-increase amount field.
heroes-feast::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add hit-point-maximum increase fields with dice/formula, duration, affected target count, and not_applicable sentinel.
heroes-feast::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hpMaximumIncrease data instead of encoding this only as HEALING description/controlOptions.

heroes-feast::status_or_state_change.issue: Immunity to the Frightened and Poisoned conditions is encoded as DEFENSIVE immunity with condition names in damageType because runtime lacks first-class condition immunity fields.
heroes-feast::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by the Condition Immunities field, which separates status-condition immunity from damage immunity.
heroes-feast::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by moving Frightened and Poisoned out of damageType and into conditionImmunity on the existing DEFENSIVE immunity effect.

heroes-feast::damage_reduction_or_preven.issue: Resistance to Poison damage is represented as a DEFENSIVE resistance effect with 24-hour duration.
heroes-feast::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional damage-prevention field required for Poison resistance.
heroes-feast::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DEFENSIVE resistance to Poison.

investiture-of-flame::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses the line direction for the action-created fire line; runtime stores the granted action but lacks a typed direction-choice field.
investiture-of-flame::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-granted action direction/placement choice fields.
investiture-of-flame::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime actionPlacementChoice data for line direction.

investiture-of-flame::attack_or_save_mod.issue: The Dexterity save and half-damage outcome for the action-created fire line are represented in the DAMAGE effect.
investiture-of-flame::attack_or_save_mod.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.

investiture-of-flame::sustain_or_recast_.issue: The repeatable action to create the fire line is represented as an on_caster_action DAMAGE effect and a granted action.
investiture-of-flame::sustain_or_recast_.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional granted-action field required for this pass.
investiture-of-flame::sustain_or_recast_.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by trigger.on_caster_action and UTILITY grantedActions.

investiture-of-flame::vision_light_sound.issue: The 30-foot bright light and additional 30-foot dim light are represented in structured light fields and runtime UTILITY light data.
investiture-of-flame::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Light Bright/Dim Radius and UTILITY light.

investiture-of-flame::damage_reduction_o.issue: Fire immunity and Cold resistance are represented as DEFENSIVE effects.
investiture-of-flame::damage_reduction_o.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional defense field required for this pass.

investiture-of-flame::environmental_chan.issue: The light, adjacent fire damage aura, and action-created fire line are represented by UTILITY light and DAMAGE effects.
investiture-of-flame::environmental_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional environmental field required for this pass.
investiture-of-flame::environmental_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY light plus on_enter_area/on_end_turn_in_area/on_caster_action DAMAGE effects.

investiture-of-flame::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'Until the spell ends' is the normal duration/concentration boundary for this spell's benefits and is already represented by timed concentration duration.
investiture-of-flame::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration.concentration and timed 10-minute duration.

investiture-of-ice::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses the cone direction for the spell-granted freezing wind action; runtime stores the granted action but lacks a typed direction-choice field.
investiture-of-ice::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-granted action direction/placement choice fields.
investiture-of-ice::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime actionPlacementChoice data for cone direction.

investiture-of-ice::attack_or_save_modif.issue: The Constitution save, half-damage outcome, and failed-save speed-halving consequence are represented.
investiture-of-ice::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
investiture-of-ice::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE and MOVEMENT conditions.

investiture-of-ice::sustain_or_recast_ac.issue: The repeatable action to create the freezing wind cone is represented as an on_caster_action DAMAGE effect and a granted action.
investiture-of-ice::sustain_or_recast_ac.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional granted-action field required for this pass.
investiture-of-ice::sustain_or_recast_ac.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by trigger.on_caster_action and UTILITY grantedActions.

investiture-of-ice::terrain_or_surface.issue: The moving 10-foot icy difficult-terrain radius is represented as TERRAIN using a schema-safe Sphere shape, and the caster's ignored ice/snow difficult terrain is represented as utility/movement prose; runtime lacks first-class moving emanation and ignore-terrain-cost fields.
investiture-of-ice::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving aura/emanation terrain fields and ignore-terrain-cost fields.
investiture-of-ice::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingTerrainAura and ignoreTerrainCost data.

investiture-of-ice::damage_reduction_or_.issue: Cold immunity and Fire resistance are represented as DEFENSIVE effects.
investiture-of-ice::damage_reduction_or_.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional defense field required for this pass.

investiture-of-ice::environmental_change.issue: The icy ground aura, caster ice/snow movement benefit, and action-created freezing wind are represented in runtime effects, with first-class schema gaps tracked under terrain_or_surface.
investiture-of-ice::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required beyond the terrain/movement gaps already recorded.
investiture-of-ice::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN, MOVEMENT, and UTILITY effects for this pass.

investiture-of-ice::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'Until the spell ends' is the normal duration/concentration boundary for this spell's benefits and is already represented by timed concentration duration.
investiture-of-ice::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration.concentration and timed 10-minute duration.

investiture-of-stone::attack_or_save_mod.issue: The Dexterity save that negates being knocked Prone is represented in the STATUS_CONDITION effect.
investiture-of-stone::attack_or_save_mod.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.

investiture-of-stone::target_filter_or_e.issue: Ejection to the nearest unoccupied space when the caster ends movement inside earth or stone is described in runtime, but there is no first-class nearest-unoccupied-space destination field.
investiture-of-stone::target_filter_or_e.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced relocation destination fields for nearest unoccupied space and invalid end-position handling.

investiture-of-stone::sustain_or_recast_.issue: The repeatable action to create the earthquake radius is represented as a granted action and STATUS_CONDITION trigger.
investiture-of-stone::sustain_or_recast_.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional granted-action field required for this pass.
investiture-of-stone::sustain_or_recast_.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by trigger.on_caster_action and UTILITY grantedActions.

investiture-of-stone::forced_movement.issue: The detector matched both knock-prone and self-ejection. Prone is represented as a status condition; self-ejection remains prose because runtime lacks invalid end-position relocation fields.
investiture-of-stone::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Track Prone under status_or_state_change and add invalid-position ejection fields for the self-ejection case.

investiture-of-stone::terrain_or_surface.issue: Earthquake ground radius, ignored earth/stone difficult terrain, and movement through solid earth/stone are represented in structured/runtime prose, but runtime lacks first-class ignore-terrain-cost and move-through-solid-material fields.
investiture-of-stone::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ignoreTerrainCost and phaseThroughMaterial data.

investiture-of-stone::status_or_state_ch.issue: Prone from the earthquake action and Stunned after invalid movement ending are represented as STATUS_CONDITION effects.
investiture-of-stone::status_or_state_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.
investiture-of-stone::status_or_state_ch.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION effects for Prone and Stunned.

investiture-of-stone::damage_reduction_o.issue: Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage is represented, but the nonmagical-attacks source restriction is only in description because defensive effects lack source/magical filters.
investiture-of-stone::damage_reduction_o.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defense source filters for magical/nonmagical attacks and source categories.
investiture-of-stone::damage_reduction_o.reviewerNote: Closed by adding Defense Source Categories -> effects[].defenseSourceFilter.sourceCategories[] and Defense Source Attack Magical Status -> effects[].defenseSourceFilter.attackMagicalStatus, then setting Investiture of Stone to attack/nonmagical.

investiture-of-stone::environmental_chan.issue: Earth/stone difficult-terrain movement and moving through solid earth or stone are represented as utility/movement effects, with first-class schema gaps tracked under terrain_or_surface.
investiture-of-stone::environmental_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required beyond the terrain/movement gaps already recorded.
investiture-of-stone::environmental_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY and MOVEMENT effects for this pass.

investiture-of-stone::conditional_ending.issue: The ordinary 'Until the spell ends' duration is represented, but the special ending when the caster ends movement inside earth or stone is only described in prose.
investiture-of-stone::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers tied to invalid end positions.
investiture-of-stone::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalSpellEnd data for ending inside earth or stone.

investiture-of-wind::attack_or_save_modi.issue: Ranged weapon attack disadvantage and the Constitution save for the wind Cube are represented.
investiture-of-wind::attack_or_save_modi.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional attack/save field required for this pass.
investiture-of-wind::attack_or_save_modi.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DEFENSIVE disadvantage_on_attacks and DAMAGE condition.saveType/saveEffect.

investiture-of-wind::sustain_or_recast_a.issue: The repeatable action to create the wind Cube is represented as an on_caster_action DAMAGE effect and a granted action.
investiture-of-wind::sustain_or_recast_a.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional granted-action field required for this pass.
investiture-of-wind::sustain_or_recast_a.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by trigger.on_caster_action and UTILITY grantedActions.

investiture-of-wind::movement_or_reposit.issue: The caster's 60-foot flying speed is represented as MOVEMENT speed_change and utility prose, but runtime lacks a first-class movement-mode field distinguishing flying speed from generic speed.
investiture-of-wind::movement_or_reposit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement mode fields for walking/flying/swimming/climbing/burrowing speed grants.

investiture-of-wind::forced_movement.issue: The Large-or-smaller failed-save push is represented as MOVEMENT push, but runtime lacks a first-class 'away from center of area' direction; caster_choice is a schema-safe placeholder.
investiture-of-wind::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced-movement origin/direction fields including away_from_area_center.

investiture-of-wind::vision_light_sound.issue: The visible point within 60 feet for the wind Cube is represented in spatialDetails notes and the granted action range limit.
investiture-of-wind::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional vision field required for this pass.
investiture-of-wind::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by spatialDetails and UTILITY grantedActions rangeLimit.

investiture-of-wind::environmental_chang.issue: The wind around the caster and the action-created swirling wind Cube are represented as defensive, movement, damage, and utility effects.
investiture-of-wind::environmental_chang.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required for this pass.
investiture-of-wind::environmental_chang.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DEFENSIVE, MOVEMENT, DAMAGE, and UTILITY effects.

investiture-of-wind::conditional_ending.closedReason: Closed by end-cleanup consequence batch 01: Investiture of Wind now has structured End Cleanup fields and runtime effects[].endCleanup[] data for removing spell-granted flying speed, causing fall_if_aloft, and allowing can_prevent_fall.
investiture-of-wind::conditional_ending.issue: Falling if still flying when the spell ends is represented in utility prose, but runtime lacks a first-class on-spell-end consequence field.
investiture-of-wind::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end consequence fields for fall/drop/other aftermath triggers.
investiture-of-wind::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime onSpellEndConsequence data for fall if still flying.

investiture-of-wind::aftermath_or_memory.closedReason: Closed by end-cleanup consequence batch 01: the spell-end falling aftermath is represented as effects[].endCleanup[].consequence = fall_if_aloft with preventedBy = can_prevent_fall.
investiture-of-wind::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The fall after the spell ends is an aftermath effect; it is recorded in utility prose but lacks first-class runtime trigger data.

investiture-of-stone.canonicalEvidence: Runtime JSON file used inconsistent PowerShell-style formatting compared with nearby spell files.
investiture-of-stone.structuredState: Structured Markdown was not affected by the formatting drift.
investiture-of-stone.jsonState: JSON data was semantically preserved while adding missing mechanics and normalizing this one file for reviewability.
investiture-of-stone.issue: Formatting drift made manual review of this spell harder and riskier while adding mechanical effects.
investiture-of-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: No spell template change required; keep formatting drift separate from mechanical schema drift.
investiture-of-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by normalizing investiture-of-stone.json during the mechanical edit and rerunning JSON, parity, runtime template, and discovery gates.
